excerpt:

posts.author: Gabor (Budai)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Our goal is to display the following data on a Dasboard/View/Report: Items from the selected board(s) which has time tracking on the given day (would be great if this would be selectable, but prefereally on “today” and “yesterday” mostly.). So a list where we can see which items we worked on on a day, and how many time is tracked.

I can not find this setting in the Timetracker widget, I only can visualize it for Person, Status …etc but not for Item Names.

I also tried with charts but I can’t really filter it for a specific date.

Any workarounds or tips? Thanks!
